description: A candid color event photograph. It shows a row of new citizens standing with right hands raised at an outdoor naturalization ceremony. From left: a man in an Army dress white and blue uniform, a man in an Army green service dress uniform, a young man in a white polo and jeans, a man in a dark business suit, and two soldiers in OCP camouflage. Seated guests in casual clothes are at far left, and other soldiers sit in white slip-covered chairs in the background in front of a tan stucco venue building with tall dark windows; red, white and blue bunting is faintly visible at right under a partly cloudy sky. It is a natural-light photograph with no overlaid slogans or graphic design; only a small faint photographer or venue watermark appears in the lower-left corner. Per the tweet, this is the Oak Grove Racetrack (Kentucky) naturalization of Fort Campbell service members.
notable_text: (none on image; small venue watermark logo only)
